title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Arihant Publications

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Arihant Publications
jsonLd.description:
Arihant Publications invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Arihant Publications:
Arihant Publications is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arihant Publications!
